findings: Strong redundancy and near-deterministic correlations exist among packet length and size features, including 'Bwd Packet Length Mean'.
Local label-topology consistency checks reveal moderate conflicts and duplicate label conflicts around 'Bwd Packet Length Mean' and 'Avg Bwd Segment Size', indicating unstable dependencies.
These unstable dependencies likely mask or distort class-conditioned variation in packet length and size features.
contradictions: Moderate label neighborhood conflicts and duplicate label conflicts represent preserved local contradictions.
limitations: Analysis limited to local neighborhoods and specific features; global dependency effects remain unassessed.
